meaning: n.侏儒怪(德国民间故事中的侏儒状妖怪)
examples: Little does my lady dream Rumpelstiltskin is my name!
Some readers will recall the fairy story of Rumpelstiltskin.
The Revenge of Rumpelstiltskin runs from Friday 18 - Saturday 19 December at 8pm.
Rumpelstiltskin actually grabs one leg at the end of his story and rips himself asunder--all right, I kind of like that one.
